name: Valiant Credit Repair Services
description_short: Credit repair company offering dispute services across all three bureaus with customized challenges and creditor negotiations to remove negative items.
description_long:
Valiant Credit Services positions itself as a North Carolina-based credit repair firm with claimed expertise spanning 17-18 years in the industry. The company focuses on disputing and removing negative items from credit reports across Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion, with the stated goal of improving clients' credit scores to enable approval for mortgages, auto loans, and other credit products.

Their core service is a single unified plan that uses multiple credit repair methods, including direct creditor challenges, attorney-approved dispute letters, and debt settlement assistance when needed. Clients receive a dedicated credit consultant plus support team assigned to their case, with monthly processing across all three bureaus for unlimited accounts. The company claims to conduct manual processing of credit files rather than using third-party processors, and offers customized action plans based on individual credit profiles.

Valiant distinguishes itself through month-to-month service agreements with no long-term contracts, a one-time lifetime enrollment fee structure, and a stated average removal rate of 80% of negative items within six months. They advertise being top-rated by customers and ranked on Expertise.com, with claims of real results documented in client testimonials. The company offers free consultations with no obligation to sign up.

However, the website contains several red flags typical of credit repair marketing: unverified claims about removal rates and timelines, vague metrics ("our clients" and "average" removal rates lack third-party verification), and promises that cannot be guaranteed by any credit repair company. The claim of "lifetime access" after one enrollment fee is promotional language that obscures the ongoing monthly fees required. No pricing information is displayed on the website, and the stated experience levels vary slightly (17 vs. 18 years) across different sections.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Month-to-month service with no long-term contracts required
Dedicated credit consultant plus support team assigned to each client's case
Claims to work on unlimited number of accounts each month
Processes disputes across all three major credit bureaus monthly
Offers customized direct creditor challenges and attorney-approved dispute letters
Provides free initial consultation with no obligation to purchase services
One-time lifetime enrollment fee provides future access without re-enrollment costs
cons: Unverified claim of 80% negative item removal within 6 months lacks independent documentation or third-party validation
No pricing transparency on website—monthly fees and enrollment fee amounts not disclosed upfront
Vague experience claims (varies between 17-18 years across website sections) and unverified Expertise.com ranking
Uses promotional 'lifetime access' language that may mislead consumers about ongoing monthly payment requirements
No specific timeline guarantees provided despite marketing emphasis on speed of results
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items across credit reports seeking coordinated dispute across all three bureaus
Those interested in direct creditor negotiation and settlement assistance alongside bureau disputes
Credit repair seekers who prefer flexible month-to-month arrangements over long-term contracts
diagnosis: Valiant Credit Services is designed for consumers with multiple negative items on their credit reports who want coordinated dispute efforts across all three bureaus without long-term contract commitment. Primary caveat: credit repair companies cannot guarantee removal of accurate negative items, and the 80% removal rate claim lacks independent verification; consumers should verify all promised results and pricing before committing.
services: Credit file and credit report analysis
Identification of negative items impacting credit score
Direct creditor challenges and customized dispute letters
Monthly processing and disputes across Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Customized action plans based on individual credit profiles
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
